text: In the first space, quiet voices murmur from behind sleek glass; I sense focus and purpose but remain a distant observer, adrift in a corridor of possibility. Shifting to the next room, vibrant colors and bold letters proclaim innovation—R+D—a space celebrating ideas. The energy here feels aspirational, electric with the promise of new knowledge. I find myself curious, inspired, and just slightly out of place in humanity’s evolving workshop.
